Disease Dis class Gene
Disease names have several widely used thesauri in
biomedical literatures. We adopt disease ontology as the Leukemia CANCER HLA-A
fundamental thesaurus for disease names and MeSH, UMLS, Alzheimer’s disease NEUROLOGICAL HFE
SNOMED-CT, and ICD10 as supplement in Table 2. Thalassemia HEMATOLOGICAL HBA1
Many disease ontology terms have references to the other Emphysema CARDIOVASCULAR GSTT1
thesauri, and it is possible to link the other four thesauri PAH metabolites, urinary METABOLIC GSTT1
to disease ontology. In this way, we extend the coverage of
disease names and maintain the tree structure of ontology.
